title: apium puberulum
intro: Apium puberulum, also known as the lesser hemlock or wild celery, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Apium puberulum include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Apium puberulum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
